name: @pryzm/email-transport
description: PRYZM 2 — transactional email transport (S48 D1). Public surface is `getEmailTransport(): Promise<EmailTransport>` — the impl is loaded via dynamic `import('./EmailTransport.impl.js')` so SMTP libs never ship in the editor's first-paint chunk. Mirrors the [strategic ADR-014] lazy pattern from @pryzm/ai-host. Real SMTP/Resend/Postmark adapter binds at S48 D9 launch when SMTP_URL is provisioned.
